last_reply: Mrrp~ Thank you so much! I'm glad you think I'm smart :) When it rains, water falls from the sky because of something called gravity. Gravity is like a force that pulls objects towards each other. The Earth is a big object, so it pulls all the little water droplets towards it and they fall down onto the ground. It makes a nice sound when it rains! Is there anything else you would like to know?
